markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Showcase Vizcom’s end-to-end design workflow](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Vizcom accelerates zero→one and refinement: sketch→color block→shadows/highlights→photo-real; reversible back to sketch for easier edits](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Core toolkit: Workbench (Miro-like) + Studio (Photoshop-like), Instant Render, Modify (NL prompting), variation tools (form/color), animation, 3D→USDZ AR, full history](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Styles (formerly Palettes) = private, workspace-scoped custom models for brand/sketch/CMF consistency; “Bone” and Scott Robertson examples](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [Verticals beyond product design: packaging, footwear/apparel, architecture/interior, concept art, gaming environments/characters](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)

## Topics

### End-to-end workflow (double diamond fit)

  - [Zero→one ideation: render from sketch, explore form/color, change expression via controls](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [Refinement: alternate views, direct on-image annotations → targeted edits](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Communication: generate 3D, export USDZ, view in AR; create animations and in-context shots](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)

### Workbench vs. Studio

  - [Workbench: board of artifacts (Miro-like) → multi-asset exploration; same toolset available](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Studio: focused canvas (Photoshop-like) → layers, sketching, compositing; persistent history per asset](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)

### Instant Render (fidelity ladder + history)

  - [Progressive passes: sketch → color block → highlights/shadows → realistic](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Select results into layer stack; full history retained → designers can compare/branch](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Reverse fidelity: convert realistic/3D back to “wide sketch” for shape-first iteration](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)

### Image compositing + adjustments

  - [Magic Erase → fix blemishes; Remove Background → isolate concepts](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Enhance + photographic controls → exposure/contrast, Lightroom-like tweaks](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Single environment replaces fragmented toolchain (image editing + AI + 3D)](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)

### Form and color variation

  - [Form “dial” axes: organic↔geometric, simple↔complex; preset terms (e.g., heavy/dense) and custom descriptors (e.g., hiking shoe → beach sandal)](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Output gallery shows spectrum from sketch-faithful to inventive](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Color variation: auto-extract palette; shuffle or map to preset/custom palettes; assets saved for reuse](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)

### Modify (natural language prompting)

  - [Contextual edits via plain text: e.g., “place sneaker on foot,” “standing on a tennis court,” “blur background”](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [Rapid in-context visualization → supports review/sell-through](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)

### Animation

  - [Prompted motion: e.g., walking on court; camera behaviors (tracking/bounce)](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Turntable generator with start frame control → angle selection for continued 2D edits](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [Any frame can be captured back to canvas for higher-fidelity still refinement](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)

### 3D generation + AR

  - [Generate 3D from concept; adjustable fidelity; compositing-friendly camera control](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Export USDZ → iOS AR viewing; value for scale-sensitive categories (furniture, footwear)](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [Example: sole unspecified yet plausible pattern generated → jump-off for resketching](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)

### Annotation-driven edits

  - [Draw callouts/lines on image → prompt-targeted changes (e.g., “raise sock to red line”)](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
  - [Scrubbable generations show how edits track across outputs](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)

### Styles (formerly Palettes)

  - [Private to workspace; act as custom mini-models](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [Use cases: brand language (e.g., Dyson-like forms), sketch style (Scott Robertson’s vehicles; “5” detail learned), CMF modes (e.g., “Bone” flat gray shaded volumetrics)](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Strength slider: 100% → sketch-faithful; lower → more prompt-led creativity (temperature analog)](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)

### Users and positioning

  - [Core: product designers (industrial, footwear/apparel)](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [Adjacent: packaging/labels, architecture/interior, concept art; gaming teams → scenes/environments/characters](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [Messaging: tool supports day-to-day tasks (CMF studies, angle selection, context comps), not “design a whole car” claims](https://fathom.video/share/vKdyHyQyMokjSQVcTTmn2fRQCGaJvsyL?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)
